title.zh-TW: 按鈕改名又會回應了，報告語言與開啟也修順
title.zh-CN: 按钮改名又会回应了，报告语言与开启也修顺
title.en: Buttons get friendlier names and real feedback, and reports open in the right language
title.ja: ボタン名が分かりやすくなり反応も返す、レポートの言語と起動も修正
title.ko: 버튼 이름이 알아보기 쉬워지고 반응도 하며, 보고서 언어와 열기도 매끄러워졌다

body.zh-TW: 面板上的按鈕變得更好懂、也更會回應你了。首先是名字改直白：「分析」改成「報告」、「CLI」（命令列介面的縮寫，工程師才懂的詞）改成「終端」，五種語言同步更新，不再只有工程師看得懂。再來，以前只有「立即更新」這顆按鈕滑鼠移上去會變色，其他像是「結束」「更換面板」「今日」「報告」「終端」全部沒反應、看起來像壞掉的；現在每顆按鈕移上去都有視覺回饋。而「終端」這顆開關（用來開關狀態列 hook 的——狀態列 hook 是一種讓程式在終端機提示列上常駐顯示一小段資訊的設定）以前只有一個小勾勾表示開著，現在按鈕底色也會跟著變，一眼分得出開還是關。另外兩個跟「報告」有關的問題也修好了：按「報告」產生的 HTML 報告，現在會跟著選單列目前的語言，不會再因為系統環境沒設好就退回英文；而開啟報告時，如果路徑裡有空白或中文字（以前會讓某些瀏覽器打不開），現在改用系統的 open 指令更穩定。就像一個店面把原本只有店員才看得懂的編號標籤，換成客人也懂的名字，每個按鈕按下去也都會亮一下告訴你「有反應喔」，而且不管你的資料夾取什麼名字都能順利結帳。
body.zh-CN: 面板上的按钮变得更好懂、也更会回应你了。首先是名字改直白：「分析」改成「报告」、「CLI」（命令行界面的缩写，工程师才懂的词）改成「终端」，五种语言同步更新，不再只有工程师看得懂。再来，以前只有「立即更新」这颗按钮鼠标移上去会变色，其他像是「结束」「更换面板」「今日」「报告」「终端」全部没反应、看起来像坏掉的；现在每颗按钮移上去都有视觉反馈。而「终端」这颗开关（用来开关状态栏 hook 的——状态栏 hook 是一种让程序在终端命令行里常驻显示一小段状态信息的设定）以前只有一个小勾勾表示开着，现在按钮底色也会跟着变，一眼分得出开还是关。另外两个跟「报告」有关的问题也修好了：按「报告」产生的 HTML 报告，现在会跟着菜单栏目前的语言，不会再因为系统环境没设好就退回英文；而开启报告时，如果路径里有空白或中文字（以前会让某些浏览器打不开），现在改用系统的 open 指令更稳定。就像一个店面把原本只有店员才看得懂的编号标签，换成客人也懂的名字，每个按钮按下去也都会亮一下告诉你「有反应喔」，而且不管你的文件夹取什么名字都能顺利结账。
body.en: The buttons on the panel are friendlier and more responsive now. First, the names got plainer: "Analyze" became "Report", and "CLI" (an abbreviation for command-line interface, jargon only engineers understand) became "Terminal", updated across all five languages so it's no longer just engineers who can read them. Second, previously only the "Refresh Now" button changed color when you hovered; the others — "Quit", "Switch Panel", "Today", "Report", "Terminal" — gave no reaction and looked broken; now every button gives visual feedback on hover. And the "Terminal" toggle (which turns the status-line hook on and off — a status-line hook is a small setup that pins a program's info in your terminal's prompt line) used to show only a tiny check mark when on, but now its background tints too, so you can tell at a glance whether it's on or off. Two report-related bugs are also fixed: the HTML report generated by clicking "Report" now follows the menu bar's current language instead of falling back to English when the system environment isn't set up; and when opening the report, paths with spaces or CJK characters (which used to break some browsers) now work reliably via the system's open command. It's like a shop swapping clerk-only numeric labels for names customers actually understand, with every button lighting up to say "I heard you" when pressed, and checkout working no matter what you named your folders.
body.ja: パネルのボタンが分かりやすく、より反応するようになった。まず名前が素直になった。「分析」は「レポート」に、「CLI」（コマンドラインインターフェースの略、エンジニアにしか通じない言葉）は「ターミナル」になり、五言語すべてで更新され、エンジニアにしか読めなかった状態を脱した。次に、以前は「今すぐ更新」ボタンだけがホバーで色が変わり、「終了」「パネル切替」「今日」「レポート」「ターミナル」は一切反応せず壊れたように見えたが、今はどのボタンもホバーで視覚的なフィードバックを返す。さらに「ターミナル」切替（ステータスライン hook のオンオフを切り替えるスイッチ。なおステータスライン hook とは、プログラムの情報を端末のプロンプト行に常駐表示させる小さな設定である）は、オンの時に小さなチェックマークしか出なかったが、今回からボタンの背景色も連動して変わり、オンかオフかが一目で分かるようになった。加えて「レポート」関連の不具合が二つ直った。「レポート」を押して生成される HTML レポートが、メニューバーの現在の言語に従うようになり、システム環境が未設定でも英語に落ちなくなり、レポートを開く際、パスに空白や中国語文字が含まれていると（以前は一部ブラウザで開けなかった）システムの open コマンドを使って安定して開けるようになった。店員にしか分からなかった番号ラベルを客にも分かる名前に変え、どのボタンも押せば「反応したよ」とひとつ光り、フォルダ名を何と付けようと問題なく会計できるようになったようなものである。
body.ko: 패널의 버튼이 알아보기 쉬워지고 반응도 잘한다. 먼저 이름이 알기 쉬운 말로 바뀌었다. '분석'은 '보고서'로, 'CLI'(명령줄 인터페이스의 줄임말로 엔지니어만 아는 말)는 '터미널'로 바뀌어 5개 언어 모두에서 갱신되었고 더 이상 엔지니어만 읽을 수 있는 상태가 아니다. 다음으로, 예전엔 '지금 새로고침' 버튼만 마우스를 올리면 색이 변했고 '끝내기', '패널 바꾸기', '오늘', '보고서', '터미널'은 반응이 없어 고장 난 것처럼 보였지만, 이제는 어떤 버튼이든 올리면 시각적 반응을 보인다. 그리고 '터미널' 토글(상태 표시줄 hook을 켜고 끄는 스위치. 상태 표시줄 hook이란 프로그램의 정보를 터미널 프롬프트 줄에 상주시켜 두는 작은 설정이다)은 켜졌을 때 작은 체크 표시만 떴지만, 이제 버튼 배경색도 함께 변해 켜졌는지 꺼졌는지 한눈에 알 수 있다. 덧붙여 '보고서'와 관련된 문제 두 가지도 고쳐졌다. '보고서'를 눌러 만든 HTML 보고서가 메뉴 바의 현재 언어를 따라가서 시스템 환경이 설정되지 않았다고 영어로 빠지지 않게 되었고, 보고서를 열 때 경로에 빈칸이나 한자가 들어 있으면(예전엔 일부 브라우저에서 열리지 않았다) 시스템의 open 명령을 써 안정적으로 열리게 되었다. 점원만 알아보던 번호 표를 손님도 아는 이름으로 바꾸고, 버튼마다 누르면 '반응했어' 하고 반짝이며, 폴더 이름을 뭐라 하든 문제없이 계산되는 것과 같다.

items.original:
**Terminal toggle button now changes background when enabled**: previously only the `✓` check mark indicated that the statusLine hook was active; now the button background tints with each panel's accent color too, so the on/off state is obvious at a glance.
**Friendlier button labels for non-developers**: "Analyze" → "Report", "CLI" → "Terminal" (with per-language translations: 終端 / ターミナル / 터미널 / 终端). All five languages updated together.
**All buttons now have hover feedback**: previously only "Refresh Now" reacted to mouse hover; "Quit", "Switch Panel", "Today", "Report", "Terminal" looked disabled. Hover now produces visual feedback at a graded intensity (primary > secondary > switch).
**Analysis reports now follow the menu bar popover language**: clicking Report (formerly Analyze) now passes the menu bar's current language into HTML report generation instead of redetecting from environment variables only, avoiding English fallback when LaunchAgent does not set `LANG`.
**macOS now opens analysis reports with `/usr/bin/open`**: previously `webbrowser.open()` constructed a `file://` URI, which some browsers refused for paths containing spaces or CJK characters. Switching to `/usr/bin/open` with the resolved path is more reliable. Thanks to @ericweichun (#9).

title.zh-TW: 面板視覺全面翻新，標題不再斷、數字不再對不上
title.zh-CN: 面板视觉全面翻新，标题不再断、数字不再对不上
title.en: Panels get a full visual refresh — titles stop clipping and numbers stop disagreeing
title.ja: パネル画面を全面リニューアル、タイトル途切れと数字の不一致を解消
title.ko: 패널 화면을 전면 단장, 제목이 잘리지 않고 숫자도 어긋나지 않는다

body.zh-TW: 你的面板畫面整個整理過，看起來更像一套 macOS 系統工具，也修掉一堆排版與數字的小毛病。預設的 classic 面板大幅翻新：卡片圓角變小、間距收緊、進度條多了凹陷與光暈、專案排行榜多了相對佔比的比例條（前 3 名強調）、底部狀態改成圓角標籤、左邊加上品牌色細條。其他七款主題面板（駭客任務、視窗 95、報紙、水族箱、雲圖、稜鏡街機、黑洞）都跟進終端開啟變色與按鈕 hover（滑鼠移上去的變色反應）效果；不過比例條只有駭客任務、視窗 95、報紙這三款跟 classic 一樣保留，水族箱、雲圖、稜鏡街機、黑洞這四款因為版面結構衝突而拆掉。各面板仍保留原本的主題視覺（綠字、像素、油墨等）。同時修掉一堆惱人的排版問題：九款面板的「專案用量」標題以前常被三顆按鈕擠到斷行（尤其英文和日韓較長的字串），現在改成兩列版型不再被裁掉；駭客任務面板的底部按鈕、視窗 95 與報紙面板的「重置倒數」文字以前會被邊框切掉，現在都調高了；切換面板時彈窗也不再出現短暫的排版錯亂。另外，同一份 Codex 對話紀錄以前在面板和報告裡可能算出不一樣的數字，現在兩邊走同一套算法，app 和報告不再對不上。官網與說明文件的展示截圖也一併補齊到九款面板。就像一間老店面重新裝潢：招牌字不再被遮、櫃子不再塞到溢出來，而且各分店統一用同一套陳列方式，客人不管走進哪一家都看得順眼。
body.zh-CN: 你的面板画面整个整理过，看起来更像一套 macOS 系统工具，也修掉一堆排版与数字的小毛病。默认的 classic 面板大幅翻新：卡片圆角变小、间距收紧、进度条多了凹陷与光晕、项目排行榜多了相对占比的比例条（前 3 名强调）、底部状态改成圆角标签、左边加上品牌色细条。其他七款主题面板（黑客任务、窗口 95、报纸、水族箱、云图、棱镜街机、黑洞）都跟进终端开启变色与按钮 hover（鼠标移上去的变色反应）效果；不过比例条只有黑客任务、窗口 95、报纸这三款跟 classic 一样保留，水族箱、云图、棱镜街机、黑洞这四款因为版面结构冲突而拆除。各面板仍保留原本的主题视觉（绿字、像素、油墨等）。同时修掉一堆恼人的排版问题：九款面板的「项目用量」标题以前常被三颗按钮挤到断行（尤其英文和日韩较长的字符串），现在改成两列版型不再被裁掉；黑客任务面板的底部按钮、窗口 95 与报纸面板的「重置倒数」文字以前会被边框切掉，现在都调高了；切换面板时弹窗也不再出现短暂的排版错乱。另外，同一份 Codex 对话记录以前在面板和报告里可能算出不一样的数字，现在两边走同一套算法，app 和报告不再对不上。官网与说明文档的展示截图也一并补齐到九款面板。就像一间老店面重新装潢：招牌字不再被遮、柜子不再塞到溢出来，而且各分店统一用同一套陈列方式，客人不管走进哪一家都看得顺眼。
body.en: Your panel has been cleaned up top to bottom — it reads more like a proper macOS system tool, and a pile of layout and number glitches got fixed. The default classic panel got a major refresh: smaller card corners, tighter spacing, progress bars with inset shadows and glow, a relative-share comparison bar on the project rankings (emphasizing the top 3), footer status turned into rounded chips, and a brand-color stripe down the left side. Seven other themed panels (Matrix, Windows 95, newspaper, aquarium, cloud, prism arcade, black hole) all picked up the Terminal active-state coloring and button hover effects; the comparison bars, though, are kept only on Matrix, Windows 95, and newspaper (same as classic) — aquarium, cloud, prism arcade, and black hole had theirs removed over a layout conflict. Each panel still keeps its original theme art (green text, pixels, ink, and so on). A batch of annoying layout bugs are fixed too: the "Project Usage" title across all nine panels used to get squeezed into a broken line by the three buttons (especially the longer English, Japanese, and Korean strings), now rebuilt into a two-row layout that no longer clips; the Matrix panel's bottom buttons and the Windows 95 / newspaper panels' "resets in" text used to get cut off by the frame, now raised to fit; switching panels no longer causes a brief layout glitch in the popover. And the same Codex session used to be counted differently in the panel versus the report — now both sides share one counting path, so the app and the report no longer disagree. The website and documentation gallery screenshots were also refreshed to cover all nine panels. It's like an old shop getting renovated: the sign isn't blocked anymore, the shelves don't overflow, and every branch uses the same display so customers see a tidy store no matter which one they walk into.
body.ja: パネル画面が総入れ替えされ、より本格的な macOS システムツールらしくなり、レイアウトと数字の細かな不具合も多数修正された。デフォルトの classic パネルは大幅に刷新され、カードの角丸が小さくなり、余白が詰まり、プログレスバーに影と発光が付き、プロジェクトランキングには相対シェアの比較バー（上位3名を強調）が加わり、フッターのステータスは角丸チップになり、左端にブランド色の細帯が入った。他の七つのテーマパネル（Matrix・Windows 95・新聞・水族館・雲・プリズムアーケード・ブラックホール）はすべて、ターミナル起動時の色変化とボタン hover（マウスを乗せたときの変色）効果を取り入れた。ただし比較バーを残したのは Matrix・Windows 95・新聞の三つだけで（classic と同じ）、水族館・雲・プリズムアーケード・ブラックホールの四つはレイアウト構造の衝突からバーを外された。各パネルのテーマ画（緑の文字、ドット、インクなど）は完全に保持している。同時に、厄介なレイアウト問題が一括して直った。九つのパネルすべてで「プロジェクト使用量」のタイトルが三つのボタンに押しつぶされて折れ曲がっていた（特に英語や日本語・韓国語の長い文字列）のが、二段組みレイアウトに変わり切り取られなくなった。Matrix パネルの下部ボタンや Windows 95・新聞パネルの「リセットまで」の文字が枠に切られていたのが収まる高さに引き上げられ、パネル切替時のポップオーバーの一時的なレイアウト崩れもなくなった。さらに、同じ Codex セッションがパネルとレポートで異なる数字に算出されていたのが、両者が同じ集計経路を通るようになり、アプリとレポートの数字が食い違わなくなった。公式サイトと説明文書のギャラリースクリーンショットも九つのパネルすべてに揃え直された。古い店舗が改装され、看板の文字が隠れず、棚がはみ出さず、さらに全店舗が同じ陳列に統一されて、どの店に入っても整然と見えるようになったようなものである。
body.ko: 패널 화면이 전면 정리되어 제법 그럴듯한 macOS 시스템 도구처럼 보이고, 자잘한 배치와 숫자 문제도 한꺼번에 고쳐졌다. 기본 classic 패널은 대대적으로 단장했다. 카드 모서리가 작아지고 여백이 좁아졌으며, 진행 막대에 그림자와 빛이 더해지고, 프로젝트 순위에 상대적 점유율 비교 막대(상위 3위 강조)가 생겼으며, 하단 상태는 둥근 표식으로 바뀌고 왼쪽에는 브랜드색 가느다란 줄이 들어갔다. 나머지 일곱 가지 테마 패널(매트릭스·윈도 95·신문·수족관·구름·프리즘 아케이드·블랙홀)은 모두 터미널 켜짐 색 변화와 버튼 hover(마우스를 올렸을 때 변하는 반응) 효과를 따른다. 다만 비교 막대는 매트릭스·윈도 95·신문 세 가지만(classic과 마찬가지로) 남겨 두고, 수족관·구름·프리즘 아케이드·블랙홀 네 가지는 배치 구조 충돌로 막대를 떼어 냈다. 각자의 테마 그림(초록 글자, 도트, 잉크 등)은 그대로 둔다. 성가신 배치 문제도 한꺼번에 해결됐다. 아홉 패널 전체에서 '프로젝트 사용량' 제목이 세 개 버튼에 밀려 잘리거나 두 줄로 꺾였던(특히 긴 영어·일본어·한국어 문자열) 것이 두 줄 배치로 바뀌어 잘리지 않고, 매트릭스 패널의 하단 버튼과 윈도 95·신문 패널의 '리셋까지' 글자가 테두리에 잘리던 것이 들어맞는 높이로 올려졌으며, 패널을 바꿀 때 팝오버가 잠깐 어긋나는 일도 없어졌다. 또한 같은 Codex 세션이 패널과 보고서에서 서로 다른 숫자로 계산되던 것이 양쪽이 같은 집계 방식을 타서 앱과 보고서 숫자가 더 이상 어긋나지 않는다. 공식 웹사이트와 설명 문서의 갤러리 스크린샷도 아홉 패널 모두로 갖춰졌다. 오래된 가게가 리모델링되어 간판 글자가 가려지지 않고 진열대가 넘치지 않으며, 모든 지점이 같은 진열로 통일되어 어느 가게에 들어가도 깔끔하게 보이는 것과 같다.

items.original:
**Classic panel large visual refinement**: pushed towards a "macOS system tool" feel — card corners 18→8, tightened spacing, progress bars gained inset track shadow and outer glow, projects list got a relative-share comparison bar (top-3 ranks emphasized), footer status became chip pills, brand-color accent stripe added on the left, brand icons gained background tint and glow.
**Six themed panels adopt the same UX trio** (matrix / win95 / newspaper / aquarium / cloud_observation / prism_arcade / black_hole): comparison bars, Terminal active-state coloring, button hover. Each panel's own theme art is preserved in full (Matrix green / Win95 pixel / newspaper print / aquarium ripple / cloud / prism rainbow / black-hole orange).
**Landing page panel gallery expanded from 6 to 9 themes**: added aquarium / prism_arcade / black_hole; classic now uses its own screenshot instead of borrowing `popover.png`.
**Refreshed all 9 panel screenshots (zh-TW & en)** in the README and on https://aqua5230.github.io/usage/.
**Visible popovers are repositioned when switching panels**: changing the active theme/panel while the popover is open now closes the old popover, rebuilds the content and size, then shows it again to avoid transient indentation or sizing glitches.
**Codex project usage and analysis reports now share one counting path**: when the same Codex session appears in multiple JSONL files, usage keeps the newer cumulative token entry; analysis reports now reuse `codex_loader.load_entries()`, and Project Usage includes Codex sessions so the app and report do not disagree for the same local data. Project Usage's Today range now matches the footer's local calendar day, and the footer no longer reloads Codex when the caller already supplied Codex entries.
**Project Usage header truncation fixed across all 9 panels**: classic & matrix were patched by @ericweichun (#9); this release completes the remaining six (win95 / newspaper / aquarium / cloud_observation / prism_arcade / black_hole). All now use a 2-row grid (icon + title on top, three buttons evenly distributed below) so English "Project Usage" and longer Japanese/Korean titles no longer clip.
**Matrix panel footer clipping**: the ASCII border + raindrop background made the content taller than the default 812 panel height, clipping the "Refresh Now / Quit" buttons. Raised to 880.
**win95 / newspaper "Resets in X" text was glued to the card edge**: bumped win95 panel height 768 → 800, newspaper → 850, and added padding-bottom to the Claude/Codex card's `.row:last-child`.
**Four grid panels (aquarium / cloud_observation / prism_arcade / black_hole) — Projects row layout rebuilt**: the original row-as-mini-card design (border + radius + background) fundamentally fought with the new column-spanning comparison bar (the bar always glued to the row card's bottom border; padding / margin / grid-template-rows tweaks all failed). Switched to flat rows with border-top dividers (same as classic), preserving each panel's theme color on the rank chip and background. Also removed the comparison bar from these four panels (grid + row-card + spanning bar is fundamentally conflicting; ROI too low). The other four panels (classic / matrix / win95 / newspaper) keep their comparison bars.
